diagnosis: The level is a massive horizontal corridor (200+ tiles wide) with almost no vertical variation — the player spawns on a flat floor, runs right across a nearly featureless plane, and the exit sits at the same elevation. Two enemies were killed and one hit was taken, but the 50-second incomplete run with zero falls indicates the player simply stopped engaging. The comment explicitly requests ladders for 'long scaling things,' confirming the absence of meaningful vertical traversal.
